Build-Depends: cmark-gfm <!nodoc>, debhelper-compat (= 13), dh-sequence-rust, help2man <!nodoc>, librust-arc-swap-dev, librust-clap-dev, librust-fastrand-dev, librust-lazy-static-dev, librust-nom-dev, librust-nom-language-dev, librust-proc-macro2-dev, librust-quote-dev, librust-syn-dev, librust-tracing-dev, librust-tracing-subscriber-dev, libstd-rust-dev, libtest2-suite-perl <!nocheck>, libtest2-tools-command-perl <!nocheck>, perl <!nocheck>
Description: sass implementation in pure rust rsass is sass reimplemented in rust with nom. . Sass is a pre-processing language for CSS. It allows you to write cleaner stylesheets and makes collaboration on your CSS a breeze. . NB! Not all of the official Sass specification is implemented yet.
Package-List: librust-rsass-dev deb rust optional arch=all rsass deb web optional arch=any
Testsuite-Triggers: dh-rust, librust-rsass-0.29+default-dev, librust-rsass-macros-dev, librust-tracing-subscriber-dev, libtest2-suite-perl, libtest2-tools-command-perl, perl
